Homefront (2013)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $20,158,492Details
International Box Office $31,536,870
Worldwide Box Office $51,695,362
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $9,341,697
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,566,061
Total $14,907,758
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A widowed ex-DEA agent who retires to a small town for the sake of his 10-year-old daughter. The only problem is he picked the wrong town.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,915,241 (34.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.92 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:39.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$22,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,570 opening theaters/2,570 max. theaters, 3.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $29,654,784

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 27th, 2013 (Wide) by Open Road
International Releases: November 28th, 2013 (Wide) (Hungary)
November 28th, 2013 (Wide) (Malaysia)
November 28th, 2013 (Wide) (Netherlands)
November 28th, 2013 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
November 28th, 2013 (Wide) (Ukraine)
Video Release: March 11th, 2014 by Universal Home Entertainment
March 31st, 2014 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong violence, pervasive language, drug content and brief sexuality.
(Rating bulletin 2281, 7/17/2013)
Running Time: 100 minutes
Plot point: DEA Agent, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Gangs, Kidnap, Narcotics, Revenge, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Social setting: Life in a Small Town
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Gary Fleder, Millennium Films, Endgame Entertainment, Open Road Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
